# fetchData

[Internal] Fetch an arbitrary set of data using natural language query. Be specific about what you want including properties for each entity, sort order, filters, limit and properties.

## Signature

- Root: `Queries`
- Return Type: [`FetchDataPayload`](../objects/fetch_data_payload-object.md)!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `query` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | Natural language query describing what data to fetch. |
